reviews.review_msg: 50% on a term project that we have to do all on our own! Absolute unfairness to the max! Glyn should go back to elementary school to learn how the world works.

Glyn's level of bad teaching has reached a new low. I'm not sure he's aware that there's only 24 hours in a day, students don't have time to be studying 24/7. Glyn has extremely poor course organization resulting in extremely unclear grading. Absolutely do not take a class with Glyn if you want to pass courses. Also he needs to wear deodorant!
Bring febreeze on you when you go near Glyn because he is so smelly your nose will evaporate. Actually ridiculous how bad Glyn's BO is. Also his course organization is downright non-existent

Absolutely awwfl professor. Glyn is one of a kind , no one else even comes close. His grading scheme involves two exams worth only 15% each. That's a lot of studying for very little. Glyn and his unfair grading is disruptive and designed to fail students. Avoid Glyn! Glyn is such an rude person and wants you to fail. Also he needs to shower!
